title: Eriobotrya deflexa

intro: Eriobotrya deflexa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as a type of flowering tree or shrub native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to aid in reducing fever, relieving headaches, and promoting digestive health. The bioactive constituents of Eriobotrya deflexa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Eriobotrya deflexa is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to formulate various herbal remedies, such as formulations for fever reduction and immune system support.
